rationale: The cited study is thematically related to the citing paper’s hospitality context (hotel revenues and digital information effects), so it could plausibly be used as mechanism or contextual prior work rather than a purely generic mention. But the evidence here is only a single DOI-matched reference with no in-text citation context, and the citing-paper note does not explicitly connect its mobile-app DID results to the cited paper’s chain-affiliation/reputation findings.
